title: Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple is an old Hindu temple situated in the mountainous forests of Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India.
overview.description: Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple is an old Hindu temple situated in the mountainous forests of Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India. The temple dedicated to Shiva is said to have been created by Parashurama. It was found during a Devaprashnam (astrological ritual) that Rama had conducted poojas in this temple. The archaeological department has stated that the temple is approximately more than 2000 years old.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Veluthodu Dam
topPlaces.description: Veluthodu dam (Malayalam: വെളുത്തോട് അണക്കെട്ട് ) is a part of Kakkad Hydro Electric Project and is located in Seethathode panchayath of Ranni Taluk in Pathanamthitta District of Kerala, India. It's a Concrete-Gravity dam built across the Veluthodu river, a tributary of Kakkad River which is again a tributary of Pamba River.

topPlaces.name: Vayyattupuzha
topPlaces.description: Vayyattupuzha is a village situated near to Chittar in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala. It is predominantly a rural hilly area but is very famous for spice trade.

topPlaces.name: Seethathodu
topPlaces.description: Seethathodu is a village in the Konni taluk, Pathanamthitta district, state of Kerala, India, near Chittar Town. Predominantly, it is a rural region with agriculture being the most important sector.

topPlaces.name: Adavi, Kerala
topPlaces.description: Adavi is a major tourist destination in Konni, Kerala, situated in the banks of Kallar river. Eco-tourism project in Adavi is jointly launched by Kerala Tourism Development Corporation and Department of Forests and Wildlife, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Moozhiyar Dam
topPlaces.description: Moozhiyar Dam is a gravity dam located close to Kakki reservoir in Seethathodu panchayath of Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. The Kakkad Hydroelectric Project is powered by water from the dam.

items.note: Veluthodu dam (Malayalam: വെളുത്തോട് അണക്കെട്ട് ) is a part of Kakkad Hydro Electric Project and is located in Seethathode panchayath of Ranni Taluk in Pathanamthitta District of Kerala, India. It's a Concrete-Gravity dam built across the Veluthodu river, a tributary of Kakkad River which is again a tributary of Pamba River.
Vayyattupuzha is a village situated near to Chittar in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala. It is predominantly a rural hilly area but is very famous for spice trade.
Seethathodu is a village in the Konni taluk, Pathanamthitta district, state of Kerala, India, near Chittar Town. Predominantly, it is a rural region with agriculture being the most important sector.

Adavi is a major tourist destination in Konni, Kerala, situated in the banks of Kallar river. Eco-tourism project in Adavi is jointly launched by Kerala Tourism Development Corporation and Department of Forests and Wildlife, Kerala.

Moozhiyar Dam is a gravity dam located close to Kakki reservoir in Seethathodu panchayath of Pathanamthitta district in Kerala, India. The Kakkad Hydroelectric Project is powered by water from the dam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (87 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aluvamkudi Sree Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Veluthodu Dam, Vayyattupuzha, Seethathodu, Adavi, Kerala, Moozhiyar Dam.
